title: Vortex Web rebrand begins
summary: Vortex2+2 is beginning its transition into Vortex Web: an unofficial, extension-powered browser client focused on native multiplayer relay support, optimisation, modular runtime work, and future scripting.
changelog: Renamed the extension branding from Vortex2+2 toward Vortex Web.
Update checks now try the new Vortex-Web repo first and fall back to the old Vortex2plus2 repo during the transition.
Added the first TypeScript/Vite runtime shell for future modular engine, asset, physics, avatar, scripting, UI, and protocol work.
Kept existing gameplay behaviour on the legacy engine while the rewrite is migrated incrementally.
Documented the direction: native multiplayer relay support, better optimisation, safer extension boundaries, and future game API/Lua support.
Added a best-effort game-focus guard for common browser shortcuts and tab-close prompts while playing.
